subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath illumined the realm of earth and heaven with His effulgent and resplendent light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را که بنور ساطع لمیع عالم ملک و ملکوترا منور نمود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
